subject: Stufful, a small pink-and-tan bear cub Pokémon, rolling playfully among pink bubbles or flowers
description: A small, round bear cub Pokémon with a pink upper body and tan lower half lies on its back or rolls in a field of soft pink bubbles or floating puffs. The setting is bright and airy with a pastel color palette. The creature wears what appears to be a pink bow or tag on its ear, adding to its stuffed-animal aesthetic. The overall mood is extremely cute and playful.
foreground: small pink-and-tan bear cub Pokémon rolling among pink bubbles
background: soft pink bubbles and pale pastel field
